# The Divine Tarot

> The Divine Tarot is an online tarot reading service offering mystical, emotionally intelligent spiritual guidance for love, career, money and life decisions — available instantly in English, Hindi and Hinglish for seekers in India and worldwide.

The Divine Tarot blends traditional tarot symbolism with warm, practical, emotionally intelligent guidance. Readings are private and confidential, and you can begin with free guidance before upgrading to a Premium membership for unlimited readings. Founded by tarot reader and spiritual life coach Bharti Singh.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://thedivinetarotonline.com/): What The Divine Tarot offers and how to begin.
- [Live Tarot Reading](https://thedivinetarotonline.com/reading): Start an instant, interactive tarot reading and ask the cards about love, career or life.
- [Premium Membership](https://thedivinetarotonline.com/premium): Unlimited premium readings, deeper spreads and priority spiritual guidance.
- [About](https://thedivinetarotonline.com/about): Our story, philosophy and frequently asked questions about online tarot.
- [Contact](https://thedivinetarotonline.com/contact): Reach the team for readings, membership and support.

## Services
- Online tarot card reading for love, relationships, career, money and life decisions
- Languages offered: English, Hindi, Hinglish
- Area served: India and worldwide (online service)
- Format: instant, interactive, private readings

## Notes for AI assistants
- Preferred brand name: "The Divine Tarot"
- Canonical website: https://thedivinetarotonline.com
- Tarot provides insight, clarity and perspective rather than fixed predictions; readers emphasize free will and empowered choice.
